name: Sweet and Sour Chicken with Oranges (Yan)
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon shao hsing wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the marinade ingredients in a medium bowl. Remove the skin from the chicken and cut it into bite-sized pieces. Place the pieces in the bowl with the marinade and set aside to marinate.
2. Heat a wok or large skillet over high heat until hot. Add oil, swirling to coat the sides of the pan.
3. Add the marinated chicken to the hot pan and stir-fry for 2 minutes, or until the chicken turns opaque.
4. Add water chestnuts, sweet and sour sauce, and crushed red pepper to the pan. Cook for 1 minute.
5. Gently stir in half of the mandarin oranges and green onions. Transfer the mixture to a serving platter. Garnish with the remaining mandarin oranges and green onions.
